title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 492.240 - Interrogatories to be annexed
text:
492.240.  Interrogatories to be annexed. — The interrogatories shall be annexed to the commission, and shall be drawn and signed by the parties or their counsel in the cause, under the sanction and direction of the court, or judge thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 1933) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1769; 1919 § 5456; 1909 § 6400
